About The Department

Université Française d'Égypte (UFE)

The Digital Marketing major at UFE teaches you how to combine creativity, technology, and strategy to grow brands and reach audiences online. Over three years, you will gain practical experience through real projects, create your own portfolio, and learn how to plan campaigns, manage social media, optimize websites, and analyze results. Graduates are ready to work as digital marketing specialists, content creators, social media managers, SEO experts, or brand strategists. Start your journey at UFE and turn your passion for digital into a real career.

🎯 Our Mission

From Zero to Digital Expert.

You don't need to know anything about digital marketing when you join — we're here to make sure you understand it all and can put it into action.

📚

Learn & Grow

Master the latest tools and strategies from scratch, and develop creative, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

🚀

Real Experience

Gain hands-on experience through real projects and campaigns that prepare you for local and global job markets.

🎓

Dual Degrees

Earn dual degrees from our Egyptian and French universities while exploring innovation and growing personally and professionally.

With us, you won't just know digital marketing — you'll be able to do it and succeed.

Student Stories

What Our Students Say

"Real stories from students who turned their learning into real experience."

★★★★★

"From the moment I started this major, I realized how practical it is. Most of the work we do is hands-on, which makes the learning experience much more engaging. One thing I didn't expect at all was that we would study programming and learn how to code — that honestly came as a surprise, but turned out to be a very valuable part of the major.

I found my internship opportunity through the university's job fair. We worked mainly on social media content — going out, shooting videos, and preparing them for publishing. It was a really enjoyable experience.

What makes this major stand out is that it is not purely theoretical. You are not completely shocked when you enter the job market — you already have some level of experience. The university is improving every year and bringing more opportunities, and that is clearly getting better over time."

L
Lena
Year 2 — Digital Marketing Student
★★★★★

"My internship experience was genuinely eye-opening. I joined the marketing team and was involved in real campaigns from start to finish — not just observing, but actively contributing. It was fast-paced and sometimes overwhelming, but incredibly rewarding.

One of the biggest differences I noticed is that in the workplace, you're expected to take initiative, ask the right questions, and deliver results without constant guidance. During my internship, I applied concepts like audience segmentation, the marketing funnel, and consumer behavior to real campaigns — seeing these ideas work in practice made everything we studied feel much more relevant.

This experience helped me overcome self-doubt and build real confidence — not just from studying, but from actually delivering results. It showed me how dynamic, strategic, and data-driven Digital Marketing really is."

Mz
Mazin
Year 2 — Digital Marketing Student
★★★★★

"My internship experience felt like being thrown into the deep end — in the best way possible. From the very first week, I was involved in real meetings, contributing ideas, and working on tasks that actually mattered. It wasn't just theoretical learning, it was real responsibility.

One of the biggest differences I noticed is that in the real world, 'done and effective' often matters more than 'perfect but late.' I applied concepts like buyer personas in real scenarios, helping build strategies based on actual customer data — that's when everything we studied started to feel truly relevant.

Most importantly, it changed how I see Digital Marketing — it's not just about creating content, but about creating impact. Every decision is driven by strategy and results."

Mo
Mohamed
Year 2 — Digital Marketing Student

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the entry requirements for Digital Marketing at UFE? ▼
You need a high school diploma or equivalent (American Diploma, IB, IGCSE, Thanawaya Amma, or French BAC). No prior marketing knowledge is required — we start from scratch.
Is the degree internationally recognized? ▼
Yes. The Digital Marketing program is offered in partnership with IUT de Blois – Université de Tours in France. You graduate with both an Egyptian degree from UFE and a French degree from Université de Tours, recognized across France, Europe, and internationally.
How long is the Digital Marketing program? ▼
The program runs over 3 years. Each year builds on the previous one — from foundational concepts in Year 1 to advanced campaigns, strategy, and a full portfolio by Year 3.
What jobs can I get after graduating? ▼
Graduates are ready to work as digital marketing specialists, content creators, social media managers, SEO experts, brand strategists, campaign managers, and more — in Egypt and internationally.
Is the program taught in French or English? ▼
The program is taught primarily in English. French is included as a complementary language throughout the curriculum, giving you bilingual skills that strengthen your career prospects both locally and globally.
Will I work on real projects during the program? ▼
Absolutely. Hands-on experience is at the core of what we do. You'll work on real campaigns, build your own portfolio, and graduate with practical skills you can use from day one.
How do I apply? ▼
Simply fill out the Registration Form on this page, or contact us directly at admission@ufe.edu.eg or by calling 17054. Our admissions team will guide you through every step.

21 Egyptian Ismailia Road, El Shorouk, Cairo Governorate 4923116.
